critical_finding.issue: API parameter mapping mismatch between frontend and backend

evidence.api_call: curl multi-select with agents=test&hashtags=ai,test returns 0 results
evidence.root_cause: Backend expects hashtag format with # prefix, frontend sends without

previous_approach.method: Component isolation testing with mocked API responses

missed_integration_points.gap: Frontend sends hashtags as 'ai,test', backend expects '#ai,#test'
missed_integration_points.test_type: Integration testing with real API calls

missed_integration_points.gap: Clear filter state not propagated through full request cycle
Complex filter object not validated against actual backend expectations
missed_integration_points.test_type: Contract testing between frontend and backend

failure_signature.symptom: Zero results from valid filter + unable to reset
failure_signature.cause: Parameter format mismatch in API layer

api_contract_validation.test_pattern: Always test API calls with actual backend

state_flow_testing.test_pattern: Full user journey testing from UI action to API response

methodology_changes.improved: Use real API calls in integration tests
